title: rubus × lenispiceus
intro: Rubus × lenispiceus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or Leni raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the yellow raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a unique plant with desirable characteristics. The medicinal properties of Rubus × lenispiceus include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Rubus × lenispiceus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, making it a versatile ingredient for culinary and medicinal uses.
